FECT, EXCEPT AS MODIFIED FOR SUPERVISED VISITATION SCHEDULE, TO BE SUPERVISED BY EITHER MS. HOWARD OR MS. KELLY. PARTIES MAY USE THE RALLY PROJECT
AFTER TESTIMONY, ARGUMENT, AND SUBMISSION, THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING ORDER. THE COURT ORDERS A STANDARD CONDUCT RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST RESP
HALL HAVE ONE OVERNIGHT PER WEEK SAT. 2:30P-ISH TO SUN. EARLIEST EXCHANGE (11A), EXCHANGES AT RALLY; COST TO BE EQUALLY SPLIT. RESP ALSO CV MONDAY
SHE MAY HAVE CHILD FOR ALL OF ONE WEEKEND PER MONTH BUT MUST GIVE RESP A MAKE UP OVERNIGHT VISIT. PARTIES SHOULD MAKE APPOINTMENT WITH FCS KAREN
, RESP TO PAY CS OF $170/MO. BEGINNING 7/1/01, ON FIRST OF MO. CHILD CARE SHALL B E EQUALLY SPLIT. COUNSEL TO DETERMINE ARREARS AND CREDIT FOR
E RUNNING OF TIME. PET TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PER DIEM WAIVED AS THIS IS A DV ACTION. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, #5797.
